# ADR-XXXX: <Decision Title>

- Date: YYYY-MM-DD
- Status: Proposed | Accepted | Deprecated | Superseded
- Owner: <team/person>
- Reviewers: <team/person>
- Related PR / Issue / RFC: <links>

## 1. Decision Statement

用一句话说明：

- 要解决什么问题
- 选择了什么方案
- 哪些关键约束驱动了这个决定

## 2. Context

### Current State

- 现在系统是怎样工作的
- 当前方案为什么不够用
- 哪些部分已经落地，哪些只是目标态

### Decision Drivers

- Security / Compliance
- Reliability / Operability
- Latency / Throughput
- Cost / Team capacity
- Time-to-market

## 3. Options Considered

| Option | Summary | Pros | Cons | Why Not Chosen |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| A |  |  |  |  |
| B |  |  |  |  |
| C |  |  |  |  |

## 4. Decision

- Chosen option:
- Scope:
- Non-goals:
- Explicit assumptions:

如果是分阶段落地，明确写：

- 当前阶段做什么
- 下一阶段再做什么
- 什么事情故意不在这次里做

## 6. Security / Data / Audit Impact

- 数据边界是否变化
- 权限边界是否变化
- 是否需要新增审计事件
- 是否影响模型、密钥、租户隔离

## 7. Operational Impact

- 需要哪些监控 / 告警
- 需要哪些 runbook / SLO / capacity note
- 失败时如何降级

## 8. Migration and Rollback

1. Migration plan
2. Backward compatibility / compatibility layer
3. Validation checkpoints
4. Rollback trigger
5. Rollback steps

## 9. Evidence Required

- [ ] Functional evidence
- [ ] Security / permission evidence
- [ ] Audit / traceability evidence
- [ ] Rollback drill or rollback proof
- [ ] Documentation updated
